_comment: Example task config. Copy this file and modify for your task.
_comment_fields: Fields starting with _ are stripped by the config loader.
_comment_agent: Name of the Claude Code agent definition in .claude/agents/<agent>.md
_comment_model: Claude model to use. Default: opus
_comment_input: Folder containing input files. Each file = one work item. Any format.
_comment_output: Optional. If set, files already present here are skipped during init.
_comment_jobs: Where the manifest, results, and logs are stored.
_comment_stale: Minutes before an uncompleted in-progress item is reset to pending. Default: 30
_comment_on_complete: Optional shell command run when ALL items are done. Supports {jobs_folder}, {input_folder}, {output_folder} substitution.
